name: caseflow
description: Team development standards plugin with Java coding rules, design-doc requirements, and workflow guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Shared engineering standards and documentation workflows.
interface.longDescription: A reusable standards plugin for engineering teams. It provides Java coding standards, design-document requirements, commit guidance, bug-analysis workflows, project-document initialization, and business-logic orientation before refactoring.
defaultPrompt: Draft a design doc before implementing this feature.
Review this Java code using the team standards plugin.
Map the current business logic before refactoring this module.
